news.title:
Macquarie raises Adani Ports' TP to ₹1,860, citing FY27-28 volume/earnings growth.
Key drivers include NQXT consolidation, transshipment, coal volumes, and logistics/marine growth.
news.summary:
Macquarie raises Adani Ports' TP to ₹1,860, citing FY27-28 volume/earnings growth.
Key drivers include NQXT consolidation, transshipment, coal volumes, and logistics/marine growth.

news.title:
Macquarie hikes Adani Ports target to Rs 1,860, citing resilient domestic volumes and global expansion, implying 26% upside.
NQXT acquisition adds 40 MMT to FY27 volumes, boosting earnings. Shares rose 27% in 12 months; analysts remain bullish.
news.summary:
Macquarie hikes Adani Ports target to Rs 1,860, citing resilient domestic volumes and global expansion, implying 26% upside.
NQXT acquisition adds 40 MMT to FY27 volumes, boosting earnings. Shares rose 27% in 12 months; analysts remain bullish.

news.title: Adani Ports will hold its Q4 earnings call on April 30 at 6pm.
news.summary: Adani Ports will hold its Q4 earnings call on April 30 at 6pm.

news.title:
Adani Ports warns of short-term margin pressure from shipping fee waivers under DG Shipping rules.
The impact may be partly offset by a recovery in shipping volumes, as per NDTV Profit.
news.summary:
Adani Ports warns of short-term margin pressure from shipping fee waivers under DG Shipping rules.
The impact may be partly offset by a recovery in shipping volumes, as per NDTV Profit.

news.title:
Adani Group to invest ₹33,081 crore in Odisha for three projects.
The investment spans digital infra, power generation, and cement manufacturing.
news.summary:
Adani Group to invest ₹33,081 crore in Odisha for three projects.
The investment spans digital infra, power generation, and cement manufacturing.

news.title:
Adani Group stocks surged, led by Adani Enterprises (+10%) and Adani Ports (+8%), amid legal case dismissal plea in the US.
Broader market gains, easing crude prices, and GDP optimism boosted sentiment; analysts urge caution amid legal challenges.
news.summary:
Adani Group stocks surged, led by Adani Enterprises (+10%) and Adani Ports (+8%), amid legal case dismissal plea in the US.
Broader market gains, easing crude prices, and GDP optimism boosted sentiment; analysts urge caution amid legal challenges.

news.title:
Nifty 50 and Sensex rebounded as US-Iran ceasefire led Nifty to rise 3.5% to 23,938 and Sensex 3.7% to 77,392.
Large-cap stocks like DLF, M&M, HDFC Life, LIC, Adani Ports, ICICI Bank show potential upside up to 63% amid valuation gaps.
news.summary:
Nifty 50 and Sensex rebounded as US-Iran ceasefire led Nifty to rise 3.5% to 23,938 and Sensex 3.7% to 77,392.
Large-cap stocks like DLF, M&M, HDFC Life, LIC, Adani Ports, ICICI Bank show potential upside up to 63% amid valuation gaps.

news.title:
Adani Ports opened 6.49% higher on April 8, 2026, reflecting strong sentiment.
The robust start highlights positive momentum in the transport infrastructure sector.
news.summary:
Adani Ports opened 6.49% higher on April 8, 2026, reflecting strong sentiment.
The robust start highlights positive momentum in the transport infrastructure sector.

news.title:
Nomura reaffirms 'Buy' on six stocks, including Hindustan Aeronautics, Adani Ports, Dabur, Marico, FSN E-Commerce, and Godrej Consumer, with 24-62% upside.
Key drivers include strong order pipelines, demand recovery, margin resilience, and diversified business operations across sectors.
news.summary:
Nomura reaffirms 'Buy' on six stocks, including Hindustan Aeronautics, Adani Ports, Dabur, Marico, FSN E-Commerce, and Godrej Consumer, with 24-62% upside.
Key drivers include strong order pipelines, demand recovery, margin resilience, and diversified business operations across sectors.

news.title:
Nomura maintains Buy on Adani Ports with ₹1,850 target, citing FY26 cargo growth of 11% YoY to 501MT.
FY26 projections include 14%/13% YoY revenue/EBITDA growth; valuation attractive at 11x FY28F EV/EBITDA.
news.summary:
Nomura maintains Buy on Adani Ports with ₹1,850 target, citing FY26 cargo growth of 11% YoY to 501MT.
FY26 projections include 14%/13% YoY revenue/EBITDA growth; valuation attractive at 11x FY28F EV/EBITDA.

news.title:
Goldman Sachs maintains a positive view on Adani Ports.
The target price has been revised downward to ₹1,710.
news.summary:
Goldman Sachs maintains a positive view on Adani Ports.
The target price has been revised downward to ₹1,710.

news.title:
Brokerages issued fresh ratings: Buy on TVS Motor, Marico, Adani Ports, Sobha; Underweight on Dabur.
Key drivers: Dabur's Q4 EBITDA growth, Marico's food segment strength, and TVS Motor's pricing power.
news.summary:
Brokerages issued fresh ratings: Buy on TVS Motor, Marico, Adani Ports, Sobha; Underweight on Dabur.
Key drivers: Dabur's Q4 EBITDA growth, Marico's food segment strength, and TVS Motor's pricing power.

news.title:
Adani Group adopts a 3-layer structure to flatten hierarchy and empower frontline.
Gautam Adani stated all businesses are being redesigned for better organization.
news.summary:
Adani Group adopts a 3-layer structure to flatten hierarchy and empower frontline.
Gautam Adani stated all businesses are being redesigned for better organization.

news.title:
Adani Ports achieved record March 2026 cargo volume of 46 MMT, up 11% YoY.
FY26 cargo exceeded 500 MMT with 19% container growth; Haifa port delivered 0.77 MMT.
news.summary:
Adani Ports achieved record March 2026 cargo volume of 46 MMT, up 11% YoY.
FY26 cargo exceeded 500 MMT with 19% container growth; Haifa port delivered 0.77 MMT.

news.title: Adani Ports achieves 500 MT cargo handling milestone, marking a key achievement.
news.summary: Adani Ports achieves 500 MT cargo handling milestone, marking a key achievement.

news.title:
NCLT Ahmedabad approves Adani Harbour Services' amalgamation with Adani Ports.
The scheme adheres to Sections 230-232 of the Companies Act; announced on April 1, 2026.
news.summary:
NCLT Ahmedabad approves Adani Harbour Services' amalgamation with Adani Ports.

news.title:
APSEZ handled 500 MT cargo in FY26, marking an 11.1% YoY growth.
The company aims to achieve 1 billion tonnes of cargo handling by 2030.
news.summary:
APSEZ handled 500 MT cargo in FY26, marking an 11.1% YoY growth.
The company aims to achieve 1 billion tonnes of cargo handling by 2030.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel secures $1B investment for Nxtra Data, boosting its data center business. Adani Ports surpasses 500M tonnes of cargo handled, enhancing investor confidence.
PhysicsWallah reports ₹205 crore during Vishwas Diwas, up 36%. IndiGo names Willie Walsh as CEO to stabilize operations amid rising fuel costs and competition.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel secures $1B investment for Nxtra Data, boosting its data center business. Adani Ports surpasses 500M tonnes of cargo handled, enhancing investor confidence.

news.title:
Adani Ports crosses 500M tonnes of cargo handled with a network of 19 ports.
APSEZ targets 1B tonnes by 2030, leveraging integrated logistics infrastructure.
news.summary:

news.title:
Motilal Oswal reiterates BUY on Adani Ports with a target price of INR 1,820.
Despite global shipping disruptions, APSEZ's exposure remains limited; robust volumes expected with NQXT addition.
news.summary:
